28.reason: This line incorrectly increments cnt when encountering a non-letter character within a word, causing empty entries and missing words. It should not increment cnt here; instead, it should just reset pos and continue processing the same word.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  This line incorrectly increments cnt when encountering a non-letter character within a word, causing empty entries and missing words. It should not increment cnt here; instead, it should just reset pos and continue processing the same word.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  This increments cnt when encountering a non-letter character, but the current word may not have been fully processed. Also, it does not null-terminate s[cnt].ss before moving to the next index, causing leftover characters from previous words.
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.25 , reason:  遇到非字母时直接增加cnt，应在增加前先给当前单词添加'\0'；而且循环结束后还会再增加一次，导致产生空单词
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  Incorrectly increments cnt and resets pos for each non‑letter character, creating empty word entries.
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [When a non-letter character is encountered, the current word should be terminated and a new word started. However, resetting pos to 0 and incrementing cnt here discards any letters processed before the non-letter character, leading to incomplete or missing words. Also, it may create empty entries.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [When a non-letter character is encountered, the current word should be terminated and stored, but resetting pos to 0 and incrementing cnt discards any partial word built so far. Also, after the loop ends, the last valid word isn't properly null-terminated or counted if it doesn't end with a non-letter.]

31.reason: Increment count for the final word.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  This always increments cnt after processing each token, even if the token was empty or contained only non-letter characters, leading to empty entries in the array.

38.reason: [This checks for space, but empty strings are represented by '\0', not space. It should check if s[i].ss[0] == '\0'. As a result, empty entries (from erroneous cnt increments) may not be skipped properly, though in this case they might print as blank lines. However, the main issue is the creation of those empty entries earlier.]
